---
title: "Exploring Repair cafes"
subtitle: "From tidytuesday data"
author: "Siddhesh Pujari"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup

# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(conflicted)
library(admiral)
library(polyglotr)
library(countrycode)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(plotly)
library(arrow)
library(shiny)

# conflicts
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)

# Load required data
data_path <- here::here("2026_04_07_repair_cafes/data/")
repairs <- read_parquet(paste0(data_path, "repairs.parquet"))
electric_non_electric <- read_parquet(paste0(data_path, "electric_non_electric.parquet"))
world_cafes <- readRDS(paste0(data_path, "world_cafes.rds"))

repairs_by_month <- repairs |> 
  mutate(repair_month = floor_date(repair_date, "month")) |> 
  count(repair_month, name = "no_of_repairs")
```


## {.sidebar}


```{r}
selectInput("select_country" ,"Select country", c("All countries", unique(repairs$country_name)), selected = "All countries")
selectInput("select_cafe" ,"Select repair cafe", c("All repair cafes", unique(repairs$repair_cafe_name)), selected = "All repair cafes")
# selectInput("select_year" ,"Select year", c("All years", unique(repairs$repair_year)), selected = "All years")
```

## Column

```{r Plot number of repairs}
plotlyOutput("plot_no_of_repairs")
```

```{r Plot most presented products}
plotlyOutput("plot_most_presented_products")
```

```{r Sort by brands}
tagList(
    selectInput(
        "sort_brands",
        label    = NULL,
        choices  = c("Sort by number", "Sort by success rate"),
        selected = "Sort by number"
    ),
    br(),
    plotlyOutput("plot_most_presented_brands")
)
```

```{r server - prep}
#| context: server

# Filtering logic
repairs_filtered <- reactive({
    repairs |>
        filter(
            if (input$select_country == "All countries") TRUE else country_name == input$select_country,
            if (input$select_cafe == "All repair cafes") TRUE else repair_cafe_name == input$select_cafe
        )
})

observe({
    updateSelectInput(
        session,
        inputId  = "select_cafe",
        choices  = c("All repair cafes", unique(repairs |> 
                        filter(if (input$select_country == "All countries") TRUE 
                               else country_name == input$select_country) |>
                        pull(repair_cafe_name))),
        selected = "All repair cafes"
    )
})
```

```{r Plot-no of repairs}
#| context: server

# Plot — number of repairs over time
output$plot_no_of_repairs <- renderPlotly({
    p <- repairs_filtered() |>
        mutate(repair_month = floor_date(repair_date, "month")) |> 
        count(repair_month, name = "no_of_repairs") |> 
        ggplot(aes(x = repair_month, y = no_of_repairs)) +
        geom_area(fill = "#e8734a", alpha = 0.3) +
        geom_line(color = "#e8734a", linewidth = 0.8) +
        scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
        labs(
            title = paste("Number of repairs in", input$select_country),
            x = "Year", y = "Number of repairs"
        ) +
        theme_classic()

    ggplotly(p) |> 
        style(hoverinfo = "none", traces = 1) |> 
        plotly::layout(hovermode = "x unified")
})
```

```{r server- most products presented}
#| context: server

# Plot — most presented products
most_products_pres <- reactive({
    repairs_filtered() |> 
        count(kind_of_product, name = "no_products_presented") |> 
        arrange(desc(no_products_presented)) |> 
        head(10) |> 
        mutate(kind_of_product = fct_reorder(kind_of_product, no_products_presented)) 
})

output$plot_most_presented_products <- renderPlotly({
    p <- most_products_pres() |> 
        ggplot(aes(x = kind_of_product, y = no_products_presented, fill = kind_of_product)) +
        geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
        guides(fill = "none") +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = "Most presented products", x = "", y = "") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(
            axis.ticks         = element_blank(),
            panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
            plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
            panel.border       = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
        )
    ggplotly(p)
})
```

```{r server-most presented brands}
#| context: server

# Plot — most presented brands
most_brands <- reactive({
    df <- repairs_filtered() |> 
        filter(!brand %in% c("Unknown/n.a.", "unknown/n.a.", NA)) |> 
        group_by(brand) |> 
        summarise(
            no_products_presented = n(),
            success_rate          = sum(repaired == "yes") / n(),
            .groups               = "drop"
        )

    if (input$sort_brands == "Sort by number") {
        df |> arrange(desc(no_products_presented)) |> head(10) |>
            mutate(brand = fct_reorder(brand, no_products_presented))
    } else {
        df |> arrange(desc(success_rate)) |> head(10) |>
            mutate(brand = fct_reorder(brand, success_rate))
    }
})

output$plot_most_presented_brands <- renderPlotly({
    y_var   <- if (input$sort_brands == "Sort by number") "no_products_presented" else "success_rate"
    y_label <- if (input$sort_brands == "Sort by number") "Number of products" else "Success rate"

    p <- most_brands() |> 
        ggplot(aes(x = brand, y = .data[[y_var]])) +
        geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#e75480") +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(title = "Most presented brands", x = "", y = y_label) +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(
            axis.ticks         = element_blank(),
            panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
            plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
            panel.border       = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
        )
    ggplotly(p, tooltip = "none")
})
```
